step_rationale: ECM collagen component of fibrous cap; degradation marker post-MI.
mechanism: COL3A1 is a structural collagen component of the fibrous cap; its remodeling/turnover marks plaque degradation and post-MI healing.

references.title: A combined analysis of bulk RNA-seq and scRNA-seq was performed to investigate the molecular mechanisms associated with the occurrence of myocardial infarction.

Dan-shen Yin attenuates myocardial fibrosis after myocardial infarction in rats: Molecular mechanism insights by integrated transcriptomics and network pharmacology analysis and experimental validation.
Meta-Analysis of Extracellular Matrix Dynamics after Myocardial Infarction Using RNA-Sequencing Transcriptomic Database.
